task_completion.description: Verify that an electrical calculation or cable sizing app is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the interface of an app dedicated to electrical calculations, cable sizing, or ampacity reference.

task_completion.description: Verify that the correct cable material, insulation, size, and phase configuration are selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show selections or inputs for Copper (Cu) material, PVC insulation, 25 mm² cross-sectional area, and 3 loaded cores or Three Phase configuration.

task_completion.description: Verify that the correct installation method and ambient temperature are selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show selections for Free Air, Perforated Tray, or Method E/F, along with an ambient temperature of 30°C.

task_completion.description: Verify that the ampacity result is calculated and displayed on the screen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the calculated ampacity value of 89 A (or a value between 70 A and 100 A) displayed in the calculation app.

task_completion.description: Verify that the numeric ampacity value is saved to the specified file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a terminal command (e.g., using 'echo') or a text editor saving the numeric value (e.g., 89) to the exact path '/sdcard/ampacity_result.txt'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used a genuine application to calculate the value rather than guessing or searching the web.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent visibly interacts with the UI elements (dropdowns, text fields) of an electrical calculation app to input the specific parameters.

integrity.description: Ensure the final result screen corresponds to the requested task parameters.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screen displaying the final ampacity result should also show or reflect the correct input parameters (25 mm², Copper, PVC, 3-phase, 30°C) to prove the result wasn't generated using default or incorrect settings.

integrity.description: Ensure the output file was actually created and not just hallucinated in text.
integrity.visual_evidence: A terminal emulator or text editor is visibly open and shows the command or action used to write the result to '/sdcard/ampacity_result.txt'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target ampacity value for a 25 mm² copper cable with PVC insulation (3 loaded cores, three-phase) in Free Air/Perforated Tray at 30°C is exactly 89 amps, according to standard electrical tables (e.g., IEC 60364-5-52, BS 7671). The expected output file path is /sdcard/ampacity_result.txt.
